subject: fix(menu): remove backdrop overlay and clean up dead code
body:
The navbar's backdrop-filter creates a containing block that traps
position:fixed children — the backdrop only covered the navbar area.
Moving it outside would cover the menu (z-index stacking conflict).
Removed the backdrop element since click-outside uses a document
handler and scroll uses body overflow lock. Removed dead z-backdrop
CSS utility.

Tags: bugfix, cleanup, mobile, ui
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
